series.title: Anatomica Invisibilia
series.subtitle: The Invisible Anatomy
series.governance_rule: The illustration series is the aesthetic source. Downstream tools inherit from this guide; they should not overwrite the visual standard unless the style guide itself is revised.

plates.title: Fascial Architecture Composite
plates.subject: Cross-section of layered fascia showing superficial, deep, and visceral layers as horizontal stratigraphy.

plates.title: Meridian Pathway Bloom
plates.subject: Meditative human figure with botanical flowering along heart, liver, and lung meridian lines.

plates.title: Fascia-Nerve Interface
plates.subject: Microscopic view of nerve fibers intermingling with fascia layers.

plates.title: Tensegrity Cell Architecture
plates.subject: A single cell rendered as a tensegrity structure of tension cables, compression struts, and suspended nucleus.

plates.title: Extracellular Matrix Landscape
plates.subject: The extracellular matrix rendered as a microscopic terrain with collagen formations, proteoglycan structures, fibroblasts, and laminin sheets.

plates.title: Ground Substance — The Liquid Crystal
plates.subject: Split plate showing gel-to-sol thixotropic transition in ground substance.

plates.title: Biotensegrity — Full Body
plates.subject: Skeleton as floating compression struts suspended in a continuous fascial tension web.

plates.title: Piezoelectric Bone
plates.subject: Bone crystal structure generating electrical charge under mechanical compression.

plates.title: The Interstitium
plates.subject: Fluid-filled network between tissues rendered as subterranean lake system.

plates.title: Myofascial Meridians — Superficial Back Line
plates.subject: Continuous fascial line from plantar fascia to scalp fascia.

plates.title: Myofascial Meridians — Superficial Front Line
plates.subject: Anterior continuous fascial line in frontal view with anatomical stations.

plates.title: Vagal Nerve — The Wanderer
plates.subject: Full vagus nerve pathway from brainstem to gut rendered as a river system.

plates.title: Dermatome Map
plates.subject: Sensory nerve territories rendered as landscape provinces.

plates.title: Trigger Point Topography
plates.subject: Referred pain patterns as weather maps.

plates.title: Fascial Force Transmission
plates.subject: Mechanical pull at the ankle traced through the continuous fascial network to the skull.

plates.title: Acoustic Resonance in Tissue
plates.subject: Sound wave propagation through different tissue densities.

plates.title: Schumann Resonance and Biological Clocks
plates.subject: Earth's 7.83 Hz electromagnetic pulse and biological timing metaphor.

plates.title: The Chakra-Fascia Overlay
plates.subject: Energy centers mapped onto fascial convergence zones.

plates.title: DNA Helix as Tensegrity
plates.subject: Double helix as nanoscale tensegrity structure.

plates.title: The Complete Energy Body
plates.subject: Capstone composite unifying fascia, meridians, tensegrity, frequency, and botanical systems.
